creator: freebsd@coombscloud.com
text:
Created attachment 201415
emulators/emulationstation: Rev 1 (v2.7.1)

Tobias,

This patch should address the concerns noted. 

Re: use of "compiler:gcc-c++11-lib", yes there was trouble getting the port to build with Clang. It's obviously been a while since I did this, but I recall trying Clang first, and eventually giving up and using gcc.
